title: Zoom in - new text shows, old text disappears, X disappears
scenario: Zooming in on a big blue dot in the Poly Studio Mobile app causes old text (headline, swipe) and X button to disappear, replaced by new description text
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Locate a big blue dot (e.g., a device or notification indicator) on the screen.
Tap or interact with the big blue dot to zoom in on it.
Observe the UI elements on the zoomed-in view.
expected: When zooming in on the big blue dot, the existing headline and swipe text should remain visible, and the X (close) button should persist to allow dismissing the view. New description text may appear but should not replace or hide existing elements.
